case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER et al VS. NOBLU, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA NOBLU

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NOBLU, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA NOBLU , INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOBLU, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA NOBLU , INC. $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
